[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0111011 5
1 1111110 6
2 0011111 5
3 1111111 a
4 1111011 6
5 1101011 5
6 1110110 5
7 1111111 a

01 1100000 2
12 0000100 1
23 0100001 2
34 0010000 1
45 0001000 1
56 0010110 3
67 0001000 1
70 0000001 1

13 0000101 2
24 0110001 3
35 0001000 1
46 0000010 1
57 0010100 2
60 0001001 2
71 1100000 2

03 1100100 3
14 0010101 3
25 0001001 2
36 0010010 2
47 0001000 1

61 1100000 2
72 1000000 1

51 1100000 2
62 1000000 1

05 0000000 a
